section.div: Bypass MDM Setup for MacOS, up to MacOS Tahoe 26.3
cut Fable 5 token usage by rendering text context as images
Tool-calling quality benchmark for LLM serving stacks. 80+ deterministic scenarios testing multi-turn orchestration, safety boundaries, and structured output. Supports vLLM, SGLang, and llama.cpp.
Leading Git-based headless CMS. Successor to Netlify/Decap CMS. Modern UX, first-class i18n support, mobile support + 100s of improvements. Framework-agnostic, open source & free.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
